strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add an explicit micro-lemma stating the necessary and sufficient upper-endpoint feasibility condition for the three-dose chord witness in Conjecture 2, so the strict phase-transition claim is not hidden in prose.

State a separate K=2 normalization-pasting sub-conjecture before the full finite-grid version; this would give Stage 0 a smaller decisive target and a clean fallback contribution if arbitrary K pasting fails.

Add Baitairian et al.'s exact sharp APO model convention to the comparison block, distinguishing whether its continuous sensitivity model is identical to or only comparable with the Jesson CMSM ratio used here.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 with Conjecture 1 as the field-tier kernel and the K=2 pasting case as the first proof target.
